message:
Running command: WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Find the synthesis netlist used in floorplan
NL_FILE=$(cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/09-openroad-floorplan/state_in.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('nl',''))")
echo "Netlist used in floorplan: $NL_FILE"
echo ""
wc -l "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check amuxbus in the netlist
grep -c "amuxbus" "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "amuxbus references found"
grep "clk_amuxbus_a" "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Find the synthesis netlist used in floorplan
NL_FILE=$(cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/09-openroad-floorplan/state_in.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('nl',''))")
echo "Netlist used in floorplan: $NL_FILE"
echo ""
wc -l "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
# Check amuxbus in the netlist
grep -c "amuxbus" "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "amuxbus references found"
grep "clk_amuxbus_a" "$NL_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5
